prompt: Create FOUR distinct logo options for a coffee affiliate website named 'Coffee Gear Lab'. Style must complement a warm, premium, clean design system using earthy coffee tones (#2C1810, #5C3D2E, #7A5B4A, #EFDFCE) with optional subtle CTA green accent (#059669). Vector-style flat mark, no photorealism, no gradients, no shadows, transparent background. Option directions: (1) minimalist coffee bean + magnifier, (2) lab flask merged with coffee cup icon, (3) geometric grinder burr emblem, (4) monogram CGL with coffee steam line. Include a readable wordmark 'Coffee Gear Lab' beneath or beside icon. Keep balanced spacing and strong legibility on light backgrounds.
